name.ja: インスタント・ギフト

requirement.en: Reveal 1 Level 7 Warrior Type Fusion Monster with 2500 ATK in your Extra Deck, and declare 1 monster that is mentioned on that monster as material.

effect.en: Special Summon 1 monster whose card name was declared to meet the requirement from your Graveyard face-up to your field. Then, you can draw 1 card. This turn, you can only attack with Warrior Type monsters.
